target.title: feat(skills): Add new 'travseal' skill for C2PA asset notarization
target.body:
# OpenClaw Outreach Materials

This file contains the draft text for a pull request and accompanying communication to the OpenClaw development team.

---

## Pull Request Title

`feat(skills): Add new 'travseal' skill for C2PA asset notarization`

## Pull Request Body

### Summary

This PR introduces a new, self-contained skill: **TraveSeal**. It allows an OpenClaw agent to acquire C2PA-compliant cryptographic stamps for any digital asset (like an image URL), providing verifiable proof of the asset's origin and integrity.

We believe this is a powerful new capability for the OpenClaw ecosystem, especially for agents operating in environments where trust and authenticity are critical.

### How it Works

The skill provides a single tool: `travseal.stamp_asset(url: str)`. 

Behind the scenes, this tool calls the TraveSeal API, which is a service purpose-built for the AI agent economy. It uses a Web3-native micropayment ledger on the Base L2 network to handle authentication and billing, allowing for frictionless, sub-cent transactions without the need for credit cards or direct blockchain interactions by the agent.

This PR includes:
- `skills/travseal/SKILL.md`: The skill manifest.
- `skills/travseal/main.py`: The Python implementation.

### Getting Started

To use the skill, a user would need to get a TraveSeal API key (available after a one-time balance deposit) and set it in their OpenClaw configuration. We've designed this to be as simple as possible and have documented it in the `SKILL.md`.

### Why We're Submitting This

We are developers building infrastructure for the agent economy, and we see OpenClaw as a leading platform in this space. We wanted to make our service a native capability for OpenClaw agents. This skill provides a useful tool to your users and serves as a blueprint for how other monetized, Web3-powered tools can be integrated into OpenClaw.

We are excited to contribute to the OpenClaw ecosystem and are happy to make any changes needed to get this merged.

---

## Accompanying Communication (e.g., for Discord or GitHub Discussion)

Hey OpenClaw team,

We're big fans of what you're building. As fellow developers in the agent infrastructure space, we wanted to contribute a new skill that we think your users will find valuable.

We just submitted a PR to add a **TraveSeal skill**. It allows an agent to get a C2PA cryptographic stamp for any digital asset, which is becoming super important for fighting fraud and misinformation.

The cool part is how it's monetized. The TraveSeal API is built on Base and uses a Web3 micropayment ledger, so agents can pay for stamps with tiny, frictionless transactions. We see it as a potential model for how other developers could monetize their own tools within the OpenClaw ecosystem.

We've built the skill to be self-contained and easy to review. The PR is ready for you to take a look. We'd be thrilled to get your feedback and are happy to help in any way to get it merged.

Cheers,
- The TraveSeal Team
